MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the personal representative Leona Gomez and the Attorney Robert Shepard to appear on July 19, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to address the failure to respond to the examiner's notes regarding the accounting. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Boncato. (Not Reported)
